diagrams.title: Basic NFA Structure for 'abb' Pattern
diagrams.description: NFA that accepts strings ending with 'abb' showing branching for 'a' and 'b'
diagrams.purpose: Shows how NFA branches on input and reaches final state

diagrams.title: NFA with ε-transitions
diagrams.description: NFA showing ε-transitions for language a*b*
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates ε-transitions for spontaneous state changes

diagrams.title: Subset Construction Visualization
diagrams.description: Mapping NFA state sets to DFA states
elements: DFA state as containing circle of NFA states
Transition arrows between sets labeled with input
diagrams.purpose: Visualizes how DFA states are formed from subsets of NFA states

visuals.title: Nondeterministic Finite Automata
visuals.description: Visual diagram for nondeterministic finite automata
